reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion, actualmente en obras para mejorar las comodidades. Las habitaciones del hotel muy amplias y comodas. El restaurante igualmente comodo, bien atendido y buenas comidas. Precios razonables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, currently undergoing renovations to improve amenities. The hotel rooms are very spacious and comfortable. The restaurant is equally comfortable, with good service and delicious food. Reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneF9ydGdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para pernoctar. Seguro, con cochera, restaurante en el lugar. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stay. Safe, with a garage, and an on-site restaurant. Excellent service.
